title: rosa obtusifolia var. obornyana
intro: Rosa obtusifolia var. obornyana is a type of flowering plant in the rose family, known for its fragrant, pink or white flowers and edible hips. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Rosa obtusifolia var. obornyana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the flowers, leaves, or hips, and are often used to treat various health conditions.
